description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 3 tenant cluster. Pins isolation review of real systems apart from tenant semantics and data-layer design.

cases.prompt: Go through the app and tell me whether tenants can reach each other's data — include exports, search, the support console, and the new AI feature.
cases.reason: An existing system is audited for leakage across surfaces — review, not modeling or storage design.

cases.prompt: Honestly we've never defined what a 'tenant' even is here — accounts, teams, and workspaces all overlap. Sort that out first.
cases.reason: There is no defined boundary to review against; semantics must be modeled first.

cases.prompt: We're adding multi-tenancy to the database next sprint — pick the scoping approach and design how tenant context flows into every query.
cases.reason: Forward-looking data-layer design, not an audit of an existing system.
